title: Introducing the Sakura CSS Framework to My Blog
author: Bagus Perwira
summary: Discover why I chose the Sakura CSS framework for my blog, highlighting its lightweight nature, class-free styling, and minimalist design.
content:
Why I Chose the Sakura Framework

I've previously used popular frameworks like Tailwind and Bootstrap, but I often found myself spending a lot of time adding classes to my code. Let's be honest, I was just too lazy to add all those classes! After some research, I discovered the Sakura framework.

Benefits of Sakura

  • Lightweight: Sakura is incredibly lightweight, which ensures that my blog loads quickly and performs well.
  • No Need for Classes: One of the standout features of Sakura is that it doesn't require adding classes to your HTML elements. You simply include the CSS file, and your content is styled automatically.
  • Minimalist Design: The framework provides a clean and minimalist aesthetic, which perfectly aligns with the vision I have for my website.

If you're looking to create a minimalist website with minimal effort, I highly recommend giving Sakura a try. It's a fantastic option for those who prefer a simple, drag-and-drop approach to web design.
